name: Eggplant with Quinoa & Chickpeas
recipeIngredient: ½ large Onion, peeled and chopped
1 Poblano pepper, seeded and chopped finely
1 Banana or Hungarian pepper, seeded and chopped finely
½ cup Tomato puree or tomato sauce
recipeInstructions:
Preparation time: 20 minutes
Baking Time: 1 hour
1. In a large pot, bring water to boil. Slice the eggplants in half and scoop out the insides. Place the eggplant shells in the water and cook until soft, about 10 minutes. Chop the eggplant insides and set aside.
2. In another saucepan, bring quinoa and water to a boil, then reduce heat, cover, and cook until all the water is absorbed, about 15 minutes.
3. In a large frying pan, add water and heat over medium heat. Add onion, garlic, peppers, and eggplant insides, and sauté, adding a little more water as needed. Then add tomato puree, salt, pepper, walnuts, and chickpeas. Cover and simmer about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Turn off the heat for all three pans. Drain the eggplant shells from the water.
5. Add the cooked quinoa, wheat flour, and gluten flour to the vegetable sauté and stir well.
6. Place the eggplant shells in a large casserole dish with a cover. Fill the eggplant shells with the quinoa mixture.
7. Put the cover on the casserole dish and place it in the oven preheated to 350°F.
8. Bake for 1 hour. Serve with steamed vegetables, such as cauliflower, and a green salad, such as spinach salad.
